creator: mopsfelder@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, Dec 3, 2009 at 1:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-Mojo,
>
> Please note that PR ports/141140 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141140
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

The attached patch should be OK.

~/ncvs/ports/www/p5-Mojo# portlint -C
looks fine.

Thanks Andrey for your initial patch.

-- 
Murilo Opsfelder Araujo
